startup_description: We are a DeepTech healthcare infrastructure platform. We provide an FDA-cleared ML diagnostic API for radiology labs, currently deployed in 12 major hospitals with $1.2M ARR. Our moat is a proprietary dataset of 5 million annotated scans.
founder_data: Ex-DeepMind researcher (PhD) and a commercial co-founder with 2 successful healthcare exits.

startup_description: An AI wrapper around ChatGPT that helps local restaurants write their social media posts. We charge $5/month. Currently have 3 free users.
founder_data: Recent college grad with marketing degree, no engineering experience.

startup_description: We are revolutionizing the decentralized spatial computing metaverse using synergistic GenAI agents on the blockchain to disrupt legacy paradigms. Total TAM is $4 Trillion.
We are building an app to help people.
An AI platform that predicts when your dog needs to go to the bathroom based on their eating habits.
founder_data: Ex-VP of Engineering at Google, Ex-Stripe PM, raised $5M previously for a successful B2B SaaS.

startup_description: A novel quantum-resistant encryption protocol designed for financial institutions to secure ledgers against next-gen quantum decryption attacks. Huge market demand.
founder_data: High school student who read a whitepaper. No mathematical background.
